name: Wind Walk
description: You and up to ten willing creatures you can see within range assume a gaseous form for the duration, appearing as wisps of cloud. While in this cloud form, a target has a Fly Speed of 300 feet and has Resistance to damage from nonmagical weapons. The only actions a target can take in this form are the Dash action or a Magic action to begin reverting to its normal form. Reverting takes 1 minute, during which the target is Incapacitated and can't move. Until the spell ends, the target can revert to cloud form, which also requires a 1-minute transformation.
